---
title: "quarto-nav.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/docs/site_libs/quarto-nav/quarto-nav.js"
loc: 273
complexity: 36
logic_score: 1.00
style_score: 4.05
intel_score: 4.77
overall_score: 3.27
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `headroomChanged`
- `announceDismiss`
- `annEl`
- `annId`
- `announceRegister`
- `annEl`
- `annId`
- `isDismissed`
- `actionEl`
- `init`
- `lastScrollTop`
- `scrollDownBuffer`
- `scrollUpBuffer`
- `btn`
- `hideBackToTop`
- `showBackToTop`
- `currentScrollTop`
- `throttle`
- `timeout`
- `context`
- `args`
- `later`
- `headerOffset`
- `headerEl`
- `footerOffset`
- `footerEl`
- `dashboardOffset`
- `dashboardNavEl`
- `updateDocumentOffsetWithoutAnimation`
- `updateDocumentOffset`
- `topOffset`
- `bodyOffset`
- `bodyEl`
- `sidebars`
- `mainContainer`
- `linkStyle`
- `header`
- `headroom`
- `sidebars`
- `sidebars`
- `frozen`
- `headerEl`
- `observer`
- `links`
- `i`
- `sharingLinks`
- `i`
- `sharingLink`
- `href`
- `navSidebar`
- `activeItem`
- `resizeObserver`
- `elBottom`
- `viewBottom`
